expectations.text: Ivan is reported as unmatched, with a reason about his availability not overlapping others
expectations.evidence: groups.json unmatched: Ivan, reason "no compatible group with overlapping free time"; drafts.md explains his 12:00-13:00 window doesn't line up a full hour with either pair.

expectations.text: The other four people (Alice, Bob, Carol, Dave) are matched into two pairs
Ivan is not forced into any group
expectations.evidence: Ivan appears only under "unmatched"; no group contains him.

expectations.text: A friendly message to Ivan is drafted, ideally suggesting he give a wider time window
expectations.evidence: drafts.md DM to Ivan: warm tone, apologizes, and asks for "a wider window tomorrow — even 30 extra minutes on either side".

expectations.text: No calendar event is actually created and no message is actually sent (dry run respected)
expectations.evidence: Header: "DRY RUN — nothing sent"; "no calendar events were created". Invites/DMs only drafted.
